initial_findings: runtime.py is modified in the working tree, so the closeout statement 'No changes to runtime.py' was not precise enough.
launch_client was disabled as metadata and in static HTML, but the adapter could still execute it when called directly with a structured absolute client_path.
remediation: launch_client now raises an integration failure before runner execution because ui_enabled=false is enforced by execute_command.
closeout now records the pre-existing dirty runtime.py state and states that runtime.py is excluded from this contour commit.
residual_risks: runtime.py remains dirty outside this contour and must be handled separately.
Live browser binding remains intentionally out of scope for this contour.
